# Backpack

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Backpack;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Backpack { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
bag, hiking, travel, camping, school, childhood

## Categories
gaming, photography, travel

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/backpack)
